narrative:
Johan Mojica is a Left-Back for Colombia. His overall rating of 7.09/10 places him in the top 6% of left-backs at this tournament. This rating reflects both his club form over the last two seasons and his World Cup performances, with 57% of his rating from club form.

Mojica demonstrates a strong defensive presence, evidenced by 1.154 tackles, 0.692 interceptions, and 3.231 clearances per 90 minutes at this World Cup. His attacking output is more modest, with an expected goals per 90 minutes of 0.057 and expected assists per 90 minutes of 0.038 during the tournament. This suggests he contributes more through defensive solidity than direct goal involvement.

With 390 minutes played, Mojica is a regular starter for his national team, anchoring the left flank defensively. Scouts and fans should continue to observe his consistent defensive work rate and ability to prevent attacks. His offensive contributions, while present, are not his primary strength, so watch for how he balances his defensive duties with occasional forays forward.
